name: mirofish
description: MiroFish Arabic Edition - an Arabic-first swarm intelligence engine for predictive simulation

scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run --python 3.12 python run.py
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run --python 3.12 python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.smoke:backend: cd backend && uv run --python 3.12 python tests/test_app_smoke.py
